name: Putrefy
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Rot 1.

name: Putrefy2
desc: Your basic attack inflicts permanent Rot.

name: Never Full
desc:
You can heal over your max HP.
Excess HP is lost between battles.

name: NeverFull2
desc:
You can heal over your max HP.
Excess HP is lost between battles.
Gain +1 [img:str] for every 5 HP you have over max HP.

name: Supersize Me!
desc: Food and scrap pickups you spawn are bigger.

name: SupersizeMe2
desc: Food and scrap pickups you spawn are max size.

name: Fresh Meat
desc: When you eat food, gain +1 [img:str].

name: FreshMeat2
desc: When you eat food, gain +1 [img:str] and +1 to a random stat.

name: Masochist
desc: When you take damage, gain +1 [img:str], [img:con], or [img:spd] at random.

name: Masochist2
desc: When you take damage, you get +1 [img:str], [img:con], and [img:spd].

name: Glutton
desc: When a food pickup spawns within 2 tiles of you, move to it.

name: Glutton2
desc: When a food pickup spawns within 2 tiles of you, move to it with trample.

name: Hooked
desc: You can use your hook 2 additional times on your turn.

name: Hooked2
desc:
You can use your hook 2 additional times on your turn.
Your hook deals +1 damage and has Cleave.

name: Stompy!
desc:
You have Trample.
Trample damage you deal has Cleave.

name: Stompy2
desc:
You have Trample and +2 Bonus Moves.
Trample damage you deal has Cleave.

name: Barbed
desc: Your hook deals +1 damage and inflicts Bleed.

name: Barbed2
desc: Your hook deals +5 damage and inflicts Bleed.

name: Grappling Hook
desc: Your hook pulls you toward knockback-immune objects.

name: GrapplingHook2
desc: Your hook pulls you toward knockback-immune objects. Refresh your movement action when you use your hook.

name: Rankle
desc: When you take damage, gain +2 Temp Damage.

name: Rankle2
desc: When you take damage, gain +1 Damage and +1 Temp Damage.

name: Spin to Win
desc: Your basic attack is a 3x3 tile spin attack with Cleave.

name: SpintoWin2
desc: Your basic attack is a 3x3 tile double spin attack with Cleave.

name: Confrontational
desc: When you take damage, trample one tile towards the source of damage.

name: Confrontational2
desc: When you take damage, trample all the way to the source of damage.

name: Heave Hook
desc:
Your hook can target tiles.
Units pulled by your hook gain trample while being hooked.

name: HeaveHook2
desc:
Your hook can target tiles.
Units pulled by your hook gain trample while being hooked, this trample damage is doubled.

name: Harpooner
desc: When an enemy moves in range, hook it.

name: Harpooner2
desc: When an enemy moves in range, hook it. Your hook deals +2 Damage.

name: Lord of the Flies
desc:
All flies are Charmed and get +1 Damage.
Whenever you inflict Rot, you inflict +1 Rot.

name: LordoftheFlies2
desc:
All flies are Charmed and get +4 Damage.
Whenever you inflict Rot, you inflict +1 Rot.

name: Schadenfreude
desc: Your [img:str] and [img:con] are increased by 2 for each disorder your party has.

name: Schadenfreude2
desc: All of your stats are increased by 2 for each disorder your party has.

name: Gurgitator
desc: Whenever you heal over your max HP, gain +1 [img:str].

name: Gurgitator2
desc: Whenever you heal over your max HP, gain +1 [img:str] and +1 Weapon Damage.

name: Loose Meat
desc: When you take damage, spawn a food pickup.

name: LooseMeat2
desc: When you take damage or move, spawn a food pickup.

name: Hack
desc:
Your basic attack is always critical against enemies with [img:shield].
Your basic attack's critical hits remove buffs from units.

name: Hack2
desc:
Your basic attack is always critical against enemies with [img:shield].
Your basic attack's critical hits remove buffs from units.
Your critical hits deal +100% damage.

name: Bowling Ball
desc: Adjacent and diagonal allied cats get the bonus ability Bowl.

name: BowlingBall2
desc: Adjacent and diagonal allied cats get the bonus ability Bowl+.

name: Testy
desc: When you take damage, gain +1 movement range until the end of your turn.

name: Testy2
desc: When you take damage, gain +1 movement range.

name: Indigestion
desc: Whenever you heal over your max HP, fart and inflict Poison 3 on adjacent units.

name: Indigestion2
desc: Whenever you heal over your max HP, fart and inflict Poison 3 and Burn 3 on adjacent units.

name: Incubator
desc: Whenever you heal over your max HP, spawn a rot fly.

name: Incubator2
desc: Whenever you heal over your max HP, spawn a rot fly with HP and damage equal to the excess healing.

name: Duke of Flies
desc:
At the end of the battle, all food pickups become allied flies.
Allied flies stay with you between battles.

name: DukeofFlies2
desc:
At the end of the battle, all food pickups become allied flies.
Allied flies stay with you between battles.
Your basic attack spawns flies.
